verses.text: Deborah and Barak sing, 'Praise ye the LORD.' The song. Victory bursts into praise.
Deborah and Barak sing, 'Praise ye the LORD.' The song. Victory bursts into praise.
Deborah and Barak sing, 'Praise ye the LORD.' The song. Victory bursts into praise.
God's coming shakes the earth. His coming. The Mighty One is exalted.
God's coming shakes the earth. His coming. The Mighty One is exalted.
In the days of Shamgar the roads lay waste; they chose new gods. The times. Apostasy brought misery.
In the days of Shamgar the roads lay waste; they chose new gods. The times. Apostasy brought misery.
In the days of Shamgar the roads lay waste; they chose new gods. The times. Apostasy brought misery.
Bless the LORD; rehearse His righteous acts. Rehearse. Praise recounts His deeds.
Bless the LORD; rehearse His righteous acts. Rehearse. Praise recounts His deeds.
Bless the LORD; rehearse His righteous acts. Rehearse. Praise recounts His deeds.
The tribes that came to battle are praised. Faithful. Some answered the call.
The tribes that came to battle are praised. Faithful. Some answered the call.
The tribes that came to battle are praised. Faithful. Some answered the call.
The tribes that came to battle are praised. Faithful. Some answered the call.
Some stayed home; Zebulun and Naphtali risked their lives. Divided. Some came, some held back.
Some stayed home; Zebulun and Naphtali risked their lives. Divided. Some came, some held back.
Some stayed home; Zebulun and Naphtali risked their lives. Divided. Some came, some held back.
The kings fought; the stars and the river Kishon fought too. Heaven fights. Creation joins the battle.
The kings fought; the stars and the river Kishon fought too. Heaven fights. Creation joins the battle.
The kings fought; the stars and the river Kishon fought too. Heaven fights. Creation joins the battle.
The kings fought; the stars and the river Kishon fought too. Heaven fights. Creation joins the battle.
Curse Meroz; bless Jael, who slew Sisera. Jael blessed. Her deed is honoured.
Curse Meroz; bless Jael, who slew Sisera. Jael blessed. Her deed is honoured.
Curse Meroz; bless Jael, who slew Sisera. Jael blessed. Her deed is honoured.
Curse Meroz; bless Jael, who slew Sisera. Jael blessed. Her deed is honoured.
Curse Meroz; bless Jael, who slew Sisera. Jael blessed. Her deed is honoured.
Sisera's mother waits in vain for her son. Vain wait. The proud foe never returns.
Sisera's mother waits in vain for her son. Vain wait. The proud foe never returns.
Sisera's mother waits in vain for her son. Vain wait. The proud foe never returns.
'So let all thine enemies perish, O LORD'; the land rests forty years. Rest. The song ends in hope.
